evidenceBulletsEn: OpenViking is an open-source Context Database for AI Agents from Volcengine.

summaryZh: arXiv cs.CL放出了一项围绕检索的研究型更新，指向的是推动能力边界继续外扩。这条消息值得看，不只是因为它新，而是因为它把最近这波行业主线又往前推了一截。 目前能确认的公开信号是：arXiv:2603.12271v1 Announce Type: new Abstract…
summaryEn: arXiv cs.CL published a research-led update around retrieval, aimed at pushing the capability frontier outward. What makes this worth following is that it pushes the broader industry arc a little further forward…
deckZh: arXiv cs.CL放出了一项围绕检索的研究型更新，指向的是推动能力边界继续外扩。
deckEn: arXiv cs.CL published a research-led update around retrieval, aimed at pushing the capability frontier outward.
narrativeZh: arXiv cs.CL放出了一项围绕检索的研究型更新，指向的是推动能力边界继续外扩。这条消息值得看，不只是因为它新，而是因为它把最近这波行业主线又往前推了一截。
目前能确认的公开信号是：arXiv:2603.12271v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLMs are widely used in… 研究型更新不一定会马上产品化，但它能提示下一阶段能力边界正在往哪边移动。
如果把它放回这几周的节奏里看，更值得追的是它会不会从展示走向默认能力。要看后续是否出现复现、开源实现、API 化，或者被头部产品吸收进默认能力。
narrativeEn: arXiv cs.CL published a research-led update around retrieval, aimed at pushing the capability frontier outward. What makes this worth following is that it pushes the broader industry arc a little further forward.
The clearest public signal so far is this: arXiv:2603.12271v1 Announce Type: new Abstract…
Placed in the context of the past few weeks, the bigger question is whether this moves from a signal to a default capability. The next step to watch is replication, open implementation, API exposure…
whatChangedZh: arXiv cs.CL放出了一项围绕检索的研究型更新，指向的是推动能力边界继续外扩。
whatChangedEn: arXiv cs.CL published a research-led update around retrieval, aimed at pushing the capability frontier outward.
whyItMattersZh: 研究型更新不一定会马上产品化，但它能提示下一阶段能力边界正在往哪边移动。
whyItMattersEn: Research updates do not always become products quickly, but they often tell you where the capability frontier is starting to bend.
watchNextZh: 要看后续是否出现复现、开源实现、API 化，或者被头部产品吸收进默认能力。
